name: life-os
description: Life-OS is a learning-first AI system built deliberately, phase by phase, to teach how complex AI systems are designed, validated, and evolved in the real world.

scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run test
scripts.lifeos:intro: npx tsx src/platform/intake/intro/cli/intro.run.ts -- --message "I want to improve my mornings but I work weekdays and prefer direct accountability"
scripts.lifeos:intro:ai: npx tsx src/platform/intake/intro/cli/intro.run.ts -- --useAi true --message "I feel like my days are kind of unstructured and I want to get better about that."
